testing_centers.notes: Online proctored via PSI; no in-person test center required

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. ID must match the name on the exam registration. Acceptable forms include passport, driver's license, or national ID card.
exam_rules: Performance-based exam conducted in a live Kubernetes cluster terminal environment. Open-book: official documentation may be accessed during the exam at kubernetes.io, helm.sh, and github.com/kubernetes. No personal notes, unauthorized websites, or external resources permitted. No food or drink. Exam area must be clear of papers and unauthorized materials. Proctor monitors via webcam and screen share.
renewal_options: Certifications are valid for 2 years. Renewal requires retaking and passing the exam before expiry. No CE credit option — exam retake is the only renewal path.

retake_policy.notes: One free retake attempt is included with the exam purchase. A minimum 12-hour waiting period is required between attempts. The free retake must be used within 12 months of the original purchase.
